name: jcode-ragmir
description: Monorepo for Ragmir, confidential local RAG with offline cited retrieval for coding agents and scripts, plus optional local Chat and TTS.
author: Jean-Baptiste Thery (https://github.com/jb-thery)

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir-landing build && pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir-tts build && pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir-chat build && pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir build
scripts.check: pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir-landing check && pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir-tts check && pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir-chat check && pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir check
scripts.example: pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir-tts build && pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir-chat build && pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir build && node packages/ragmir-core/examples/library-api-demo/run.mjs
scripts.package:check: pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir-tts package:check && pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir-chat package:check && pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir package:check
scripts.smoke: pnpm public:smoke && node scripts/smoke.mjs && pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir mcp:smoke && pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir-tts smoke && pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir-chat smoke
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir-landing test && pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir-tts test && pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir-chat test && pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir test
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir-landing test:coverage && pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir-tts test:coverage && pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir-chat test:coverage && pnpm --filter @jcode.labs/ragmir test:coverage
scripts.validate: pnpm lint && pnpm audit:security && pnpm check && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm build && pnpm api:check && pnpm smoke && pnpm package:check && pnpm release:semantic:smoke && pnpm release:artifacts
